title: BreakEnchant
description: A mod that adds a book of enchantments for digging 1x2
body:
_The mod gives you digging 1x2 | 1x3 | 3x3 blocks with the [Tunnel] enchantment. When you hold shift, it breaks one block_

<details>
<summary>Tunnel 1</summary>

</details>

<details>
<summary>ShiftBreak</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ErtNEGCd3hQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>



The enchantment book is rarely the same as the enchantment [Repair]
The mod only works on Forge
# **📥 Installation Guide**
- _Install mod_
- _Place the mod in the folder C:\Users\*User*\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods_
- _Done_
